titleStmt.title: SII 9.330: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 330. (A.R. No. 495 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE BHIMESVARA AND DEMESVARA TEMPLE AT HIREHADAGALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1133, Prajāpati, Māgha, śu. 3, Ādityavāra corresponding to A.D. 1212 January 8 Sunday, in the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vishṇuvardhana-Vīra-Ballāḷa (II), who was ruling over Banavāsi twelve-thousand, Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, Huligere three-hundred, the two Beḷuvolas and Māsavāḍi right up to Heddoṟe, from his neleviḍu Haḷḷavura surnamed Vijayasamudra. His senior queen Padumaladēvī was ruling over Hosahaḍaṅgile. It records the gift of some plots of land made at the instance of the 120 Mahājanas of the place for the two tanks, viz., Hiriyakeṟe and Tuṁbinakeṟe by the Brāhman general, Gaṅgimayya-Nāyaka Dāvaṇṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka. The genealogy of the Daṇḍanāyaka is given and the Brāhman Mahājanas of Hosahaḍaṅgile are described as ripunāyaka-santrāsigaḷu. The record has poetical merits but is unfortunately damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīrjayaścābhyudayaśca . jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇna
vaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . nūtnapaḍaṁgilegrāmē
maśītyuttaraṁ śataṁ . viprōttamānāmabyagraṁ sthēyādācaṁdratārakaṁ .
. vritta . daḷitasarōjinīmukhamadāḷicayaṁ bahurāḷirājitōtpaḷanayanadvayaṁ ruciramūrmmika
maṁ manōharōjvaḷamoppa jaḷade varapūrṇnate Ēkalakṣmi niścaḷadinabhīṣṭamaṁ kuḍuge
camūparigaṁ niraṁtaraṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara śrīdōrāvatipuravarādhīśvara yādavakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇi sa(ṁ)myaktacūḍāmaṇi
malerājarāja maleparoḷgaṇḍa kadanapracaṁḍanēkāṁgavīranasahāyaśauryya . śanivārasiddhi . giridu
rggamalla caladaṁkarāma . niśśaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa viṣṇuvarddhanavīraballāḷudēvana rājā
nvayamenteṁdaḍe . kaṁ . viḷasadviśiṣṭahṛdbyākuḷada tamaṁ pareye hoysaṇānvayabhūbhṛtkuḷadiṁ
da vogedu nijabhujabalade jagaccakṣuvenipa vinayādityaṁ . tatputraḥ . Eṟeyaṁganṛpaḥ . tasyāgramahi
ṣī nikhiḷasaubhāgyaniḷayā . Ēcaṇadēvī . tayōḥ putrā Udayādityaballāḷaviṣṇuvarddhananāmānaḥ tē
ṣāṁ madhyē nikhiḷarājyavibhavasya viṣṇuvardhananāmamahārājasya mahālakṣmī[patēḥ .] tattanūjō narasiṁ
hadēvamahānṛpaḥ Āsīt tadagramahiṣī śrīmadēcaladēvīti vikhyātā . tastasyā māvirāsīt
vīraballāḷapṛthivīpatiḥ . Ātana parākramaveṁteṁdaḍe . vritta . lāḷabyāḷagarutma gūrjjarakubhri
ddaṁbhōḷividvēṣi pāṁcāḷaśrīlalanāpahaṁ magadhamādyatkāladaṁḍāṁkaṁ cōḷacāḷanaṁ pāṁḍyagaṁḍa mada
kōdaṁḍō grapaṁcāsya ca rōrbbiyoḷgelvarārvidviṣṭabhūpālakar . vīraballāḷana paṭṭada
rasi padumaladēviyara mahimōnnateyeṁteṁdaḍe . svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyudaye sa
hasraphaḷabhōgabhāginī dvitīyalakṣmīsamāne . kaḷahaṁsayāne samastāvanipāṁtaḥpura
viśadavirājamānarūpavidyādhari . vrittōnnatapayōdhari . parirakṣitātmīyabaṁdhuvargge .
manunītimārgge . pratyēkaprabhāvasarasvati . daśadiśāṁtarā nirmaḷayaśa(ḥ) svatī .
nirantarapravardhdhamānavīraballāḷadēvarājyalakṣmīnivāse śubhalakṣa rappa piriyarasi padmala
paṭṭamahādēviyaru posavaḍaṁgileyaṁ sudharmmadiṁ rakṣisuttamire . svasti yamaniyamasvā
dyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ dvijaprasa(ṁ)nnaruṁ śrīma
danavaratabudhanikararuciravadanasarasīruhabharavikasitasitakarakiraṇasadriśatējōmaya
vibhāsigaḷu ripunikāyasaṁtrāsigaḷu śrīmadakhiḷadivijamauḷimaṁḍanamaṇiprabhāvikasita
pādāraviṁdadvaṁdvasauṁdarāyamānaśrīmaddēmanāthacaraṇakamaḷayugaḷavilōlabhṛṁgaruṁ .
sāhasōttuṁgaruṁ . śrīmadvasudhāṁganāruciracihurāyamānaku(ṁ)ntaḷadēśamadhyavarttino
ṇaṁbavāḍi dvātriṁśatsahasrākhya nikhiḷagrāmādimukhya . śrīmajjanamējayakṣatriyōttama
datti . yaśōvati . śrīmatsarbbanamaśyadagrahāraṁ posapaḍaṁgileya mahājanaṁgaḷa samākhyeyeṁteṁdaḍe .
vritta . cāturvvēdacaturmmukharssakalaśāstraphrauḍhavāṇīsamarsvrātaṁtrarvvarādāyakaprakaṭitaprakhyāta
kīrttidhvajarbhbhūtabhrātasurakṣaṇānvitalasadṛkṣaprabharmartyamāṁdhātasaukhyapuraṁdarardhareyoḷī nūṟippati
rbbardvijaru . kaṁda . suruciravanarājigaḷiṁ varapūrṇataṭākadiṁdamoppuvudantaṟpuramagrahā
ra lakṣmīkaramenipudu rasege posapaḍaṁgile celvaṁ . © svastiyanavaratavinamadaśēṣakṣōṇīśamau
ḷikīlitamāṇikyamarīcimaṁjarīpuṁjaraṁjitapadadvaṁdvaruṁ . niravadyākhiḷadōṣadūṣitadvaṁdvaruṁ . śārada
nīradapāradatārācaḷakarppūrapūrakṣīravārāśiśaraccaṁdracaṁdrikāsphaṭikamaḷayajasmēranīhā
ratārāhāragōkṣīraśaṁkhasaṁkarāṁgaviśadayaśassudhādhavaḷitadaśadiśāvaḷeyaruṁ . bidukā
minīkamanīyaniḷeyaruṁ . dāruṇadāridryadāvapāvakakōpahatavividhajanavriṁdavaṁdita vaṁdivriṁdānaṁ
dakanakavarṣarkāḷamēgharuṁ . duritadūrīkritaugharuṁ . paravādigarbbaparbbatapakṣaschēdanapaṭutarapavi
daṁḍarprakhyātayuktiyuktaruṁ . śrutiśirassamuditaniravadyahṛdyavidyānāyakaruṁ śrīmadamara
naṁdayōgīṁdrapādāraviṁdadvaṁdvavandanānaṁditamānasaruṁ vidvajjanamanassarōjanīrājitarājahansaruṁ śrīmajjaga
dārādhyarappa śrīmadanupamasukharūpasvāmigaḷa divyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa śrīmanma
hāpradhānaṁ dāvaṇnaṁgaḷanvayaṁ . vri . sukavikadaṁbakaḷpakujavāśritayūtharasābdhipūra sātvikajanavinnu
vargganidhi gautamagōtrada kāmadhēnu vājikuḷadinēśanēcalemahātmeya vallabha gaṁgimayyanā
yakavibhuviṁda�vo posapaḍaṁgileyoppuvudī dharitriyoḷu . Ā gaṁgādharanāyakāhvaya
na vāme śrīmadēcauvvegaṁgāgarbhitatanūjanidgharavitējaṁ satyarājaṁ yaśōdyōgaṁ śrīmahadēvanāyaka
na nāri prakhye nāgauvvegaṁ śrīgaṁgādharadēvanudbhavisidaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭakaḷpadrumaṁ . dharegella svarṇnadhārāvarṣa mu
dade baṁdaṁte gōtrabrajakoppire śiṣṭēṣṭāḷigellaṁ surataru phalavādante gaṁbhīra gaṁgādharadēvapra
khyanudyatsatiguṇaviḷasaccauḍiyakkaṁge lakṣmīkarajātarddāmadaṇḍādhipa hariharamādayyaneṁba ta
nūjaru . Avariṁdagrajanatyudāttamahimaṁ śrīdāmadaṇḍādhipaṁge vadhu prakhye patibratācari
te bhāsvaddēvakīdēvi . bhāgyavati stutye mahātmavallabhe lasatsāvitridēvi prasa(ṁ)nnavaraśrī
lalanāsamānamene tāṁ dhanyaṁ dharācakradoḷu . ka . manucaritanakhiḷaguṇasajjanavinataṁ maṁtridāvaṇaṁ
jagadārādhyanupamasukharūpaprabhuvinācaraṇasarōjabhṛṁga manujōttuṁga . Ā mantri mukhya
nanujaṁ sāmajabaḷayutanamātya hariharana mahāpramadasati lakṣmīguṇas�meyenalvanite
yarssamāname dhareyoḷu . Ātananujātanavanīkhyātaṁ mādhavana vadhu patibrateguṇadoḷsītega
ruṁdhatigaṁbujajātege dore gauriyannakkanavanītaḷadoḷu . svasti śrīmatu śakavarṣada 1133 neya pra
jāpatisaṁvatsarada māpha śuddha tadige Ādityavāradaṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ hoysaṇa viṣṇuvardhanavīraba
llāḷadēvanu noṇaṁbavāgi mūvatticchāyira banavase pannicchāyira huligeṟe mūnūṟu beḷuvalaveraḍu māsavā
ḍi heddoṟe paryyaṁtaṁbaravāḷutta vijayasamudravenipa haḷḷavuranelevīḍinalirddu duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ mā
ḍi sukhadi rājyaṁgeyyuttiralātana paṭṭadarasi padumaladēviyaru hosahaḍaṁgileyanāḷuttaviral Avara māva na
parasaradhikāravāgalavaru mukhyavāgalaśēṣamahājana nūṟippatiṁbarsvāmigaḷa divyaśrīpādapadmaṁgaḷige mahāpradhā
naṁ gaṁgimayyanāyakadāvaṇnaṁgaḷu namaskāramuṁ māḍi dharmmaprasaṁgamaṁ binnapaṁ geyyalavaru hiriyekeḻege tuṁbinakeḻegaṁ
paḍisalisuvantāgi dharmmava nīṁ māḍavēḷkeṁdu besasalmahāprasādaveṁdu kaikoṁḍūraḍeyara śrīmānyada bhūmiya kra
yamaṁ koṭṭu bhūmiyuṁ kālgarccu kaidhāreyaṁ koṁḍā mahājanaṁgaḷa saṁnidhiyalu dāvaṇnaṁgaḷeraḍuṁ keḻege biṭṭa dharmma
Ūraḍeya śrīmānyada Ere mattaru 45 kkaṁ sīme . paḍuva koḷaceyōṇi baḍaga mārtimegeyi
mūḍa . dēvanāthadēvara keyi . teṁkaṇamēre dabbaṇigageyi tōṭagaṭṭa matta 2 kkaṁ sīme paḍuva Īcime
dōṭada vōṇi baḍagaṇamēre Ā vōṇi . mūḍaṇamē Ūraḍegoḷa . tenkamēre maddeyāvāḷāṇḍa . keṁgāḍa holadasīme .
paḍuva cikkabiḷalu . baḍagamēre baḷḷareya hola mūḍalu hagalaharasīme . teṁkaṇamēre bēvinakeḻeya baḍaga
ṇakōḍi . Ūraḍagēriya baḍagavāgila maneyoṁdu . Intinitu dharmmamaṁ mahājana nūṟippatiṁbaru
pratipāḷisuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.330 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
